PLATFORM BRIEF

DGOP v3.0 - Enterprise Governance Operations Platform

The operating system for enterprise data governance: a single operational layer that turns governance frameworks into daily workflows, ownership, evidence, and decisions.

SDAIA NDI
DGA NORA
NCA ECC-1:2024
PDPL 2023
DG
Governance is not a document. It is an operation.

DGOP does not replace data tools. It governs them by orchestrating responsibility, workflow, evidence, and auditability across the enterprise.

What we do

DGOP turns govern
